name: DATA Communications Management Corp.
summary: DATA Communications Management Corp., together with its subsidiaries, provides business communication solutions in North America. The company also offers warehousing, freight, and marketing services. It serves the financial institutions, insurance, healthcare, lottery and gaming, retailing, not-for-profit, energy, and governmental industries. The company was formerly known as DATA Group Ltd. and changed its name to DATA Communications Management Corp. in July 2016. DATA Communications Management Corp. is headquartered in Brampton, Canada.
